content.speakerText: Hi there! You must be Ms. Chen from ABC Corp?
content.speakerTextCn: 您好！您一定是来自ABC公司的陈女士吧？
expectedAnswers: Yes, that's me! Thanks for having me.
You got it! I'm Chen — really appreciate you coming to meet me.
Yep, Chen here. Thank you so much for the warm welcome!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确确认身份，不回避或模糊回应
语言准确性：语法正确，称谓使用恰当（Ms. Chen / Chen）
表达自然度：使用口语化但得体的表达，如 'You got it!' 或 'Yep' 符合轻松商务语境
关键词覆盖：包含 'thanks' 或 'appreciate' 等感谢词

content.speakerText: Welcome to our office! How was your trip?
content.speakerTextCn: 欢迎来到我们公司！旅途怎么样？
expectedAnswers: It was smooth, thanks! The train was on time.
Not bad at all! A bit tiring, but I enjoyed the scenery along the way.
Fine, thanks. I had a comfortable ride and arrived without any issues.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：正面回应旅途问题，不消极抱怨
语言准确性：使用恰当时态（was）和连接词（but, and）
表达自然度：加入细节（train, scenery, ride）使回答更真诚
关键词覆盖：包含 'thanks' 和至少一个具体细节

content.speakerText: Good morning! I'm Daniel from the client services team. Welcome to our headquarters!
content.speakerTextCn: 早上好！我是客户服务部的Daniel，欢迎来到我们总部！
expectedAnswers: Hi Daniel, nice to meet you. I'm Sarah from Global Innovations. Thank you for such a warm welcome!
Hello Daniel! I'm Sarah — really glad to be here. Thanks for picking me up!
Morning Daniel! It's great to finally meet you. I appreciate you taking the time to greet me.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：回应问候，自我介绍，表达感谢
语言准确性：正确使用 'nice to meet you', 'I'm...', 'Thank you' 等基本句型
表达自然度：语气热情、语调自然，符合首次见面场景
关键词覆盖：包含 'welcome', 'thank you', 'nice to meet you' 和自我介绍
